Bash(ssh -p 65002 -i id_rsa_skilltricks -o ConnectTimeout=15 u684149649@217.21.90.136 'P=~/domains/skilltricksinc.com/public_html; echo "=== public_html top ==="; ls -la $P | head -25; echo "=== is git repo? ==="; if [ -d $P/.git ]; then cd $P && git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null && git remote -v 2>/dev/null | head -1 && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head; else echo "NOT a git repo"; fi; echo "=== staging subdomain folder? ==="; find ~/domains -maxdepth 3 -iname "*staging*" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== .env present? \(do NOT print contents\) ==="; [ -f $P/.env ] && echo ".env EXISTS" || echo "no .env"')

Bash(ssh -p 65002 -i id_rsa_skilltricks -o ConnectTimeout=20 u684149649@217.21.90.136 'S=~/domains/skilltricksinc.com/public_html/staging; cd $S || exit 1; B=~/staging-backup-$\(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S\).tar.gz; echo "=== backing up tracked-tree \(excluding vendor/node_modules/storage\) ==="; tar czf $B --exclude=./vendor --exclude=./node_modules --exclude=./storage --exclude=./.git . 2>/dev/null; ls -lh $B; echo "=== pre-reset state ==="; echo "HEAD before: $\(git rev-parse --short HEAD\)"; cp .env /tmp/.env.staging.bak 2>/dev/null && echo ".env backed to /tmp/.env.staging.bak"')
